popup:minigame:jeopardy.title: Myths and Facts
lines: <h>On the categories screen
%key:general:up%, %key:general:down%, %key:general:left%, %key:general:right%: move between options
%key:minigames:select%: choose the selected question
<h>On the question screen
%key:general:up%, %key:general:down%: switch between options
%key:minigames:select%: choose the selected answer
%key:general:back%: return to categories screen

popup:minigame:textbook.title: Textbook Collection
lines: <h>On the gameplay screen
%key:textbook_minigame:left%, %key:textbook_minigame:right%: move the bag left and right to catch books
%key:textbook_minigame:slow_movement%: hold to move slower
<h>On the question screen
%key:general:up%, %key:general:down%: switch between options
%key:minigames:select%: choose the selected answer and advance

popup:minigame:cards.title: Urgency Matrix
lines: %key:urgency_matrix_minigame:next_cell%, %key:urgency_matrix_minigame:previous_cell%: switch between categories
%key:minigames:select%: select cell, or pull the next card
When hightlighting a card, you can use Up and Down to scroll
<h>When there are no cards left
press %key:minigames:select% or %key:general:back% to leave the minigame

popup:minigame:spreadsheet_wheel.title: Unexpected Expenses
lines: Use Tab to select the menu items
Use Up and Down to increase or decrease the selected item

popup:characterCreator.title: Character Creator
lines: Use Tab to switch between the menu items
Use Enter to select items

popup:controls.title: Controls
lines: Use Tab to switch between the menu items
Use Enter to select items
Select the buttons to enter the rebinding menu
press %key:general:back% or the close button at the bottom to close the controls menu
<h>Key rebinding menu
When the key area is highlighted, press any key to add or remove it from the list of keys for this action

popup:credits.title: Credits
lines: Press %key:general:back% to exit the credits

popup:newChapter.title: Chapter Complete
lines: Press %key:general:left% and %key:general:right% to highlight an option
Press %key:general:select% to select the option

popup:titleScreen.title: Title Screen
lines: Use Tab to switch between the menu items
Use Enter to select items

popup:document.title: Documents
lines: Use Tab to switch between the menu items
Use Enter to select items
Use Up and Down to scroll
Close the popup with %key:general:back%

popup:activity.title: Activities
lines: Use Tab to switch between the menu items
Use Enter to select items
Use Up and Down to scroll
Switch between pages or save and close with the buttons at the bottom

popup:minigameSelector.title: Minigame Selector
lines: Press %key:general:left% and %key:general:right% to switch between minigames
Use Enter open the selected minigame
Close the popup with %key:general:back%

popup:zoom.title: Zoom
lines: Use Tab to switch between the menu items
Use Enter to select items
Select polls in chat to access the options, then submit or press %key:general:back% to stop interacting with the poll

popup:saveGame.title: Save Game
lines: Press %key:general:left% and %key:general:right% to highlight an option
Press %key:general:select% to select the option transitions/chapter_5/transition_1

phone:null.title: Phone
lines: %key:general:up%, %key:general:down%, %key:general:left%, %key:general:right%: move between apps on the home screen
%key:general:select%: open the selected app
%key:general:back%: close phone

phone:todo.title: Todo App
lines: Press %key:general:left% and %key:general:right% to switch between the sidebar and content
Use %key:general:up% and %key:general:down% to scroll or switch categories
You can press %key:general:back% to close the app

phone:mail.title: Mail App
lines: <h>Email list
Use %key:general:up% and %key:general:down% to scroll through the list of emails
Press %key:general:select% to open an email
You can press %key:general:back% to close the app
<h>Email screen
Use %key:general:up% and %key:general:down% to choose between options or attachments
Press %key:general:select% to choose the option or open the attachment
Press %key:general:back% to return to the email list

phone:map.title: Map App
lines: Use %key:general:left% and %key:general:right% to highlight where you want to travel to
Press %key:general:select% to open the travel menu for that location, and then again to confirm
You can press %key:general:back% to cancel traveling or close the app

phone:messages.title: Message App
lines: <h>Conversation list
Use %key:general:up% and %key:general:down% to scroll through the list of conversations
Press %key:general:select% to open a conversation
You can press %key:general:back% to close the app
<h>Text screen
Use %key:general:up% and %key:general:down% scroll up through the conversation and choose between options
Press %key:general:select% to choose the selected option
Press %key:general:back% to return to the conversation list

phone:journal.title: Journal App
lines: Press %key:general:left% and %key:general:right% to switch between the sidebar and content
Use %key:general:up% and %key:general:down% to scroll or switch categories
You can press %key:general:back% to close the app

phone:dictionary.title: Dictionary App
lines: Press Up and Down scroll

phone:achievements.title: Achievements App
lines: Press %key:general:left% and %key:general:right% to switch between the sidebar and content
Use %key:general:up% and %key:general:down% to scroll or switch categories
You can press %key:general:back% to close the app

phone:settings.title: Settings App
lines: Use Tab to switch between the menu items
Use Enter to select items
Use Up and Down to scroll
You can press %key:general:back% to close the app

dialog_history.title: Dialog History
lines: Use %key:general:up% and %key:general:down% to scroll through the dialog history
Press %key:general:select% to play the voice line for the highlighted dialog line
Use %key:general:select% to open the highlighted document or activity
Press %key:general:open_dialog_history% or %key:general:back% to close dialog history

dialog.title: Dialog
lines: Press %key:general:select% to advance dialog
Use %key:general:up% and %key:general:down% choose options
Use %key:general:left% and %key:general:right% to select strategies or highlighted words

scene.title: Scene
lines: %key:general:left% and %key:general:right%: move selection between scene elements
%key:general:select%: select the highlighted element
%key:general:open_phone%: open the phone
%key:general:open_dialog_history%: open the dialog history
%key:general:dismiss_oldest_notification%: dismiss the oldest notification
%key:general:save_game%: save the game
